narrative:
Dorset Twp township has 477 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.4 percentage points.
